examples: The polarization eigcnfrequencies of symmetric and unsymmetric quantum well are given.
The QSS converter model in account of unsymmetric commutating voltages is developed for DC system.
Some novel features of multipole lens are shown through several examples, in which unsymmetric voltages are applied to the lens.
